title: Keyword Research Input
description: Discover long-tail keyword opportunities from Google Autocomplete. Input seed keywords, get scored and ranked suggestions for SEO content strategy. Free alternative to Ahrefs Keywords Explorer and SEMrush Keyword Magic Tool.

keywords.title: Seed Keywords
keywords.description: List of seed keywords to research. Google Autocomplete will return real user search suggestions for each keyword. Add 5-20 seeds for best results. Example: 'best CRM software', 'remote work tools'.

language.title: Language / Locale
language.description: Google Suggest language code. Supports 50+ languages: 'ja' (Japanese), 'en' (English), 'es' (Spanish), 'de' (German), 'fr' (French), 'pt' (Portuguese), etc.

topN.title: Top N Keywords to Output
topN.description: Number of top-scored keywords to include in results. Set higher (50-200) for comprehensive research, lower (10-20) for quick content ideas.

requestDelaySeconds.title: Delay Between Requests (seconds)
requestDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait between Google Suggest API calls. Recommended: 0.5-2.0 seconds. Lower = faster but higher risk of rate limiting.

maxQuestionPatterns.title: Max Question Variants per Seed
maxQuestionPatterns.description: Number of question-pattern suffixes (who, what, when, where, why, how) to append to each seed keyword. More patterns = more keyword ideas but longer runtime.
